messages.content:
8.

Kadayıf Dolması.

a)

Were you ever eaten

b)

Have you ever eaten

c)

Will you ever eaten

d)

Did you ever eaten

Boş bırak
: b) Have you ever eaten.

9. They... love watching movies on Friday night.

a)

using to

b)

did use to

C)

used to

d)

use to

Boş bırak
: c) used to.

10- We

another country before.

a) never visited

b) have never visited

never visit

has never visited

Boş birak

d)
b) have never visited.

11 Ayşe ... TV every night.

a)

is used to watch

b)

was used to watch

watching

used to watch

Boş bırak

d)
d) used to watch.

12. My brother's a really painter. He often has exhibitions.

grateful

close

talented

loyal

Boş bırak

d)
c) talented.

13- Alparslan says he has

Ankara but I do not belive

him.

a)

gone to

b)

been in

c)

d)

been to

gone in

Boş bırak
a) gone to.

14. I never buy meat at the market. The word "never" is

pronoun

b) adjective

c) adverb

d)

adjective

Boş bırak
c) adverb.

Ahmet didn't... do so much work.

a)

using to

b)

used to

C)

d)

use to

did use to

Boş bırak
d) did use to. (The sentence is missing the end of the sentence. It should be "Ahmet didn't used to do so much work.")

16. Last year my mum bought a for winter

tie

short

Sweater

shirt

Boş bırak

b)
c) Sweater.

He wants.. french cheese

a)

b)

some really delicious

some delicious really

C)

many really delicious

d)

many really delicious
a) some really delicious.

18- Obviously, she is sad. The adverb "obviously" modifies

a)

clause

b)

c)

pronoun

verb

d)

adjective
d) the adjective "sad".

19. You...... to come to the party if you are tired.

a)

don't have to

b)

mustn't

c)

may

d)

can
a) don't have to.

20--you like bottled or regular?

a)

305 d)

can

b)

would

c)

may

might
b) would. (Assuming the full sentence is "Would you like bottled or regular?")

21 Pharmacy is practically on the highway. The adverb "practically" modifies

a)

prepositional phrase

b)

verb

adjective

sentence

Boş bırak

d)
c) the adjective "on the highway".
